hero.headline: The money system isn't broken. It just wasn't built for you.
hero.subheadline: See what $1,000 does in a year when you have access to fair opportunities.

wedge.honest: Banks put your money to work and keep most of the upside. We think more of it belongs to you. You stay in control, and yes, you can still lose money.

sidePocket.text: This is not about investing. It is about you, for the first time, having the opportunity to change the game in your favor.

paragraphs.p1: Our founder's grandmother saved half of everything she earned her entire life. Her bank paid her almost nothing.
paragraphs.p2: She didn't know there were better options. Nobody told her. The language was too complicated. The minimums were too high. The institutions didn't care about people with small savings.
paragraphs.p3: $10,000 to open an investment account. $25 a month just to keep a checking account open. That was the price of access.
paragraphs.p4: She never had a tool that could show her, in 30 seconds, exactly what her money could become.
paragraphs.p6: New technology made it possible to go around the gatekeepers. We just had to build the door.

howItWorks.header: Take Control and Free your Money

step1.title: Send and Receive
step1.description: Send money to anyone on diBoaS. Anywhere in the world. In seconds. Free. Withdraw it anytime.

step2.title: Invest and Grow
step2.description: Choose from 10 ways to grow your money. Your money works while you sleep.

step3.title: Track and Learn
step3.description: What's moving. What it means. What you could do. Adelaide, your AI guide, explains it all in clear language, not jargon.
step3.imageAlt: Track and learn about your finances

step4.title: Buy and Hold
step4.description: Buy digital assets and hold them in your own wallet. Starting with BTC, ETH, and SOL. Stocks and Gold coming soon.

card1.title: Where does the growth come from?
card1.p1: The growth isn't magic. It's your money doing what banks do with it, but with diBoaS, you keep most of the profit instead of them.

card2.title: What happens to your money?
card2.p1: Your money lives as digital dollars in a wallet that's yours, not ours.
card2.p2: Not a balance we can freeze. Not a fund we can lend out. Not something that disappears if diBoaS disappears.
card2.p3: Available money and invested money are shown separately, so you always know what's ready and what's working.

card3.title: What if something goes wrong?
card3.p1: You can lose money. Real money. However, you're always in control. Pause deposits anytime. Pull money back when you need it. Choose safer or bolder strategies depending on your goal.

fees.title: No surprise hiding at the bottom.
fees.disclaimer: *diBoaS fees shown. Third-party provider, ramp, network, banking, or exchange fees may apply and are shown before confirmation where available.
fees.footerLine: Every fee. On the table. Nothing else.

sending.difference: Network and provider fees may apply

buying.example: Invest $100: it costs less than a penny

swapping.example: It costs less than a penny

strategies.difference: Growth options your bank doesn't offer
strategies.example: Start a $100 strategy: $0. Closing costs 39 cents.

catch.feeParagraph:
Starting a strategy is free.

When you close a strategy, diBoaS charges {sellRate} of the amount sold. Sell $100, and diBoaS earns {exampleFee}.

No hidden markup on the exchange rate. No monthly account fee. The cost appears before you decide.

paragraphs.p1: Fair question. We get it every time.
paragraphs.p2: Your money doesn't sit still at your bank. They put it to work. They earn real returns on it. What do they give you back? Almost nothing.
paragraphs.p3: The gap between what they earn and what they pay you is their entire business model.
paragraphs.p4: We close that gap. With diBoaS, the returns go to you. Not to executives. Not to branches. To you.
paragraphs.p5: Investing is free. When you sell, diBoaS takes 0.39%. You sell $100, diBoaS makes 39 cents. That's it. The only way diBoaS earns more is if your money grows first. The fee never goes above $25.
paragraphs.p6: No monthly charges. No surprise fees. No penalties for leaving.
paragraphs.p7: How is that possible? We didn't build bank branches. We didn't hire executives. We didn't inherit the costs of a system built in 1950. New technology does the same job. We pass the savings to you.
paragraphs.p8: Is there risk? Yes. We need to be straight with you about this.
paragraphs.p9: Your money isn't sitting in a bank vault. It's working through new financial technology. That means it can grow more. But it also means you can lose money. Real money. That's the tradeoff.
paragraphs.p11: We only use systems that have survived every major crash since 2020, including COVID, FTX, and Terra. We spread your money across multiple independent systems. We monitor everything, 24 hours a day. We test every strategy against past disasters before you ever see it.
paragraphs.p12: We can't guarantee returns. Nobody can. And anyone who tells you they can is lying to you.
paragraphs.p13: We win when you win. We show you both sides, the opportunities and the risks. Always.

underTheHood.toggleLabel: Want to know how it actually works?

paragraphs.p1: Architecture: diBoaS runs on open financial infrastructure. Every transaction is recorded publicly. Every system is auditable. Your money moves without middlemen taking a cut.
paragraphs.p2: Your wallet: When you sign up, you get your own wallet with your own key. diBoaS never sees it. diBoaS never stores it. diBoaS can't access it. If diBoaS disappeared tomorrow, your money would still be yours. That's not a feature we added. That's how the whole thing was built.
paragraphs.p3: Security: Nobody can move your money without your permission. Not a hacker. Not an employee. Not us. Every strategy is tested against historical crashes before you ever see it. Every transaction requires your approval.
paragraphs.p4: Lose your phone? You recover your wallet. No seed phrases, no panic.
paragraphs.p5: Transparency: Every fee is shown before you pay it. Every risk is stated plainly. No hidden mechanics. No fine print surprises.

demo.header: Don't take our word for it.
demo.subtext: What would your money do here?

socialProof.subtext: Be part of the change. Many are experiencing fair access for the first time. Subscribe to our waitlist.

paragraphs.p1: I grew up watching my grandmother Adelaide navigate a financial system that wasn't designed for her.
paragraphs.p2: She deserved better tools. So does everyone like her.
paragraphs.p3: I spent 20 years building products for other people's companies. In São Paulo, New York, Tokyo, Berlin. Now I'm building the one thing I wish had existed for her.

disclosures.general: This content is for educational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, financial advice, or any other type of advice. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Any historical data or simulations are hypothetical and not guarantees.
disclosures.crypto: The value of crypto-assets may fluctuate. You may lose some or all of your money. Crypto-assets are not covered by deposit guarantee schemes.
disclosures.ai: Certain content on this platform, including market analysis and educational materials, is generated or assisted by artificial intelligence. AI-generated content may contain errors or limitations. Users should verify information independently before making financial decisions.
disclosures.micaArticle7: This crypto-asset marketing communication has not been reviewed or approved by any competent authority in any Member State of the European Union. The offeror of the crypto-asset is solely responsible for the content of this crypto-asset marketing communication.
disclosures.us: diBoaS is a non-custodial interface providing access to decentralized finance protocols. diBoaS is not registered with the SEC, CFTC, FinCEN, or any state regulatory agency. US regulatory treatment of DeFi is evolving. You are responsible for determining whether your use of this interface complies with applicable laws.
disclosures.closing: You decide what's best for your situation.

seo.title: diBoaS | Give Your Money a Job
seo.description: Your side-pocket for wealth. Give your money a job, see the path, and stay in control. Start with $5. Not a bank, not a guarantee — you can lose money.
seo.ogTitle: Money works better when it has a job.
seo.ogDescription: Choose what your money is for, see the path, and stay in control. diBoaS never holds your money.

jsonLd.serviceDescription: Goal-driven wealth building powered by the digital dollar. Your money, your wallet, your control.
jsonLd.appDescription: Goal-driven wealth building starting at $5. Your money, your wallet, your control.

hero.headline: Money works better when it has a job.
hero.subtitle:
A reserve. A plan. A future you can point to.

Choose what this money is for. See the path. Stay in control.
hero.whatIs: diBoaS is a simple way to grow your money in digital dollars. You stay in control.
hero.microcopy: Start with $5. No monthly fee. Pull out anytime.

neverHold.body:
Your money lives as digital dollars in a wallet that belongs to you.

Not diBoaS. Not a bank. Not anyone else.

You choose. You approve. You stay in control.
neverHold.imageAlt: Your wallet, your money, your control

upside.header: The door was always there. It just didn't open for everyone.
upside.body:
For years, better financial opportunities seemed to open for people who were already rich.

Institutions. Insiders. People fluent in jargon.

diBoaS opens another door.

Access gets simpler. Risk gets clearer. You get the big slice.

pictureFuture.header: The future doesn't arrive all at once.
pictureFuture.body:
It shows up as rent.

As an emergency.

As a plan you keep putting off.

diBoaS does not promise to fix your life. It helps you separate money by what it is meant to do, understand the path, and see the risk before you decide.
pictureFuture.imageAlt: A person at golden hour, looking out to the horizon

howItWorks.step1: Pick a job for your money.
howItWorks.step1Alt: A diBoaS screen for setting a savings goal.
howItWorks.step2Alt: A diBoaS screen showing the projected savings path.
howItWorks.step3Alt: A diBoaS screen for adding money.

catch.body:
The catch is risk.

diBoaS is not a bank account, not a savings account, and not a guarantee.

Digital dollars, along with the technology and outside companies that move and hold your money, can fail or lose value. You can lose money.

Easy promises hide risk.

We put it on the table.

demo.header: Before you trust it, see it.
demo.body:
Do not take a landing page's word for it.

Try diBoaS with play money. Pick a job for your money, see the path, and understand the risk before anything real is involved.

cost.body: No monthly fee. No catch. Add $100 and you see every cent of cost before you confirm. Our fee, plus any network cost. Nothing hidden. Nothing on the side.

founder.header: Adelaide saved. The system never explained.
founder.body:
diBoaS started with my grandmother, Adelaide.

She saved with discipline. With care. With trust.

The system gave her low returns, little explanation, and almost no access to better options.

After 20 years building products for other companies, I wanted to build the one I wish she had seen:

a place where money has a job, risk has a name, and control stays with the person who earned it.
founder.imageAlt: An open notebook and reading glasses beside an old family photo

finalCta.header: Start with what you want to protect.
finalCta.body:
A reserve. A future purchase. A little breathing room. A plan that still lives in your head.

Join the waitlist and be first to try diBoaS when it opens.
finalCta.reassurance: No monthly fee. You stay in control. Pull out anytime.

tension.body:
Money sitting still can feel safe.

Until life gets expensive.

An emergency. A move. A future purchase. A little more breathing room.

diBoaS helps you see the path before you move.

sidePocket.header: A separate place for the money that matters.
sidePocket.body:
diBoaS is a second app, next to your bank. Your bank is for spending. diBoaS is where money you set aside goes to work toward something you care about.

Keep your checking account. Keep your card. diBoaS is for the part you are trying to grow.
